reference: I had an occipital nerve block on the right side of my head on Wednesday of this week. I am still experiencing tenderness, pain, and, worst of all, migraines. I have never had this type of reaction before and was wondering if this is a normal response or something I need to have checked?
text: I had an occipital nerve block on the right side of my head on Wednesday of this week. I am still experiencing tenderness, pain, and—first of all—migraines. I have never had this type of reaction before, and I was wondering if this is a normal response or something I need to have checked.
